verticals.label: Residential electrician
verticals.definition: Electrical installation, repair, and panel work for residential properties.
verticals.notes: Required vertical. Anchor example for the local-service definition.

verticals.label: Residential HVAC
verticals.definition: Heating, ventilation, and air-conditioning install, repair, and maintenance for homes.
verticals.notes: Required vertical.

verticals.label: Residential plumbing
verticals.definition: Plumbing install, repair, and drain work for residential properties.
verticals.notes: Required vertical.

verticals.label: Residential roofing
verticals.definition: Roof installation, replacement, and repair for homes.
verticals.notes: Storm/insurance work common; watch for fabricated claim language at QA. See commercial_roofing for the commercial counterpart.

verticals.label: Residential painting
verticals.definition: Interior and exterior painting for residential properties.

verticals.label: Drywall & plaster
verticals.definition: Drywall hang, finish, texture, and plaster repair for residential interiors.

verticals.label: Flooring installation
verticals.definition: Supply and installation of carpet, hardwood, tile, laminate, and luxury vinyl flooring.
verticals.notes: S3-117 Flooring pillar is the internal content-compliance reference. See kitchen_bath_showroom (retail) for the showroom variant.

verticals.label: Window & door replacement
verticals.definition: Installation and replacement of residential windows and exterior doors.

verticals.label: Garage door installation & repair
verticals.definition: Installation, repair, and opener service for residential garage doors.

verticals.label: Gutter installation & cleaning
verticals.definition: Installation, repair, and cleaning of residential gutters and gutter guards.

verticals.label: Siding installation
verticals.definition: Installation and repair of residential exterior siding.

verticals.label: Insulation installation
verticals.definition: Installation of attic, wall, and crawlspace insulation for homes.

verticals.label: Handyman services
verticals.definition: General small-job repair and maintenance for residential properties.

verticals.label: Appliance repair (residential)
verticals.definition: Repair of residential appliances such as refrigerators, washers, dryers, and ovens.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National manufacturer warranty call-centers / mail-in repair.

verticals.label: Water heater installation & repair
verticals.definition: Install, repair, and replacement of tank and tankless water heaters.
verticals.notes: Often bundled under plumbing; kept distinct for routing precision.

verticals.label: Solar panel installation (residential)
verticals.definition: Design and installation of residential rooftop solar and battery storage.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National solar financiers / online solar marketplaces (lead aggregators).
verticals.notes: Frequently sold through national dealer networks; the install/sales operator is local. See commercial_solar.

verticals.label: Foundation repair
verticals.definition: Repair and stabilization of residential foundations and slabs.

verticals.label: Waterproofing / basement waterproofing
verticals.definition: Moisture control, basement, and crawlspace waterproofing for homes.

verticals.label: Chimney sweep & repair
verticals.definition: Cleaning, inspection, and repair of residential chimneys and fireplaces.

verticals.label: Deck & patio construction
verticals.definition: Design and build of residential decks, patios, and outdoor living structures.

verticals.label: Fence installation
verticals.definition: Installation and repair of residential fencing and gates.

verticals.label: Locksmith (residential)
verticals.definition: Lock install, rekey, and lockout service for homes.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National locksmith lead-routing / dispatch call-centers.

verticals.label: Home security system installation
verticals.definition: Install and service of residential alarm, camera, and monitoring systems.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National DIY / self-monitored security brands sold online.

verticals.label: Smart home installation
verticals.definition: Install and integration of residential smart-home, automation, and AV systems.

verticals.label: Septic system services (residential)
verticals.definition: Pumping, inspection, install, and repair of residential septic systems.

verticals.label: Well & water-treatment services
verticals.definition: Well drilling, pump service, and residential water treatment/filtration.

verticals.label: Kitchen remodeling
verticals.definition: Design and remodel of residential kitchens.
verticals.notes: See construction_specialty_trades for whole-home/general remodeling.

verticals.label: Bathroom remodeling
verticals.definition: Design and remodel of residential bathrooms, including tub/shower conversions.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National bath-fitter franchisors at the corporate level.

verticals.label: Closet & storage systems
verticals.definition: Design and install of custom closets, Murphy beds, and home storage solutions.
verticals.notes: Matches the More Space Place engagement (Murphy bed / closet franchise).

verticals.label: Awning & patio cover installation
verticals.definition: Install of residential awnings, patio covers, and shade structures.

verticals.label: Screen & patio enclosure
verticals.definition: Build and repair of residential screen rooms and patio enclosures.

verticals.label: Pool installation (residential)
verticals.definition: Design and construction of residential in-ground and above-ground pools.
verticals.notes: Recurring pool cleaning/maintenance is in outdoor_grounds_services (pool_service).

verticals.label: Epoxy & garage flooring
verticals.definition: Application of epoxy and coated flooring for garages and residential concrete.

verticals.label: Commercial HVAC
verticals.definition: HVAC install, repair, and maintenance for commercial and light-industrial buildings.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National facilities-management / national mechanical-services firms.

verticals.label: Commercial plumbing
verticals.definition: Plumbing install and repair for commercial buildings and facilities.

verticals.label: Commercial electrical
verticals.definition: Electrical install, service, and code work for commercial buildings.

verticals.label: Commercial roofing
verticals.definition: Flat and low-slope roof install, repair, and maintenance for commercial buildings.

verticals.label: Commercial kitchen equipment repair
verticals.definition: Repair and maintenance of commercial cooking, refrigeration, and food-service equipment.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National OEM service networks / national field-service dispatch.
verticals.notes: Required vertical. B2B but local — install/service operator competes within a metro.

verticals.label: Commercial refrigeration repair
verticals.definition: Install and repair of walk-ins, reach-ins, ice machines, and refrigeration systems.

verticals.label: Facility / building maintenance
verticals.definition: Multi-trade building maintenance and repair for commercial facilities.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National integrated facilities-management (IFM) providers.

verticals.label: Commercial painting
verticals.definition: Interior and exterior painting for commercial buildings and complexes.

verticals.label: Commercial flooring
verticals.definition: Supply and install of commercial-grade flooring systems.

verticals.label: Fire protection & suppression
verticals.definition: Install, inspection, and service of fire sprinkler, alarm, and suppression systems.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National life-safety / fire-protection conglomerates.
verticals.notes: Life-safety regulated work; not consumer-health YMYL but heavily code-governed.

verticals.label: Commercial security & access control
verticals.definition: Install and service of commercial access control, surveillance, and alarm systems.

verticals.label: HVAC controls & building automation
verticals.definition: Install and integration of building automation and controls systems.

verticals.label: Elevator install & maintenance
verticals.definition: Install, modernization, and maintenance of elevators and lifts.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: The major national/global elevator OEMs.

verticals.label: Commercial glass & glazing
verticals.definition: Install and repair of commercial storefront glass, curtain wall, and glazing.

verticals.label: Dock & overhead door services (commercial)
verticals.definition: Install and repair of loading dock equipment and commercial overhead doors.

verticals.label: Commercial locksmith & lock systems
verticals.definition: Master-key, access hardware, and lock service for commercial facilities.

verticals.label: Parking lot striping & maintenance
verticals.definition: Striping, sealcoating, and maintenance of commercial parking lots.

verticals.label: Sign installation & maintenance
verticals.definition: Install, service, and repair of commercial signage and illuminated signs.

verticals.label: Commercial generator install & service
verticals.definition: Install and maintenance of standby generators for commercial facilities.

verticals.label: Boiler service
verticals.definition: Install, repair, and maintenance of commercial and industrial boilers.

verticals.label: Industrial equipment repair (local)
verticals.definition: On-site repair and maintenance of industrial machinery for area businesses.
verticals.notes: Local-service when the operator serves a defined service radius; national field-service firms excluded.

verticals.label: Kitchen exhaust / hood cleaning
verticals.definition: Cleaning and certification of commercial kitchen exhaust hoods and ductwork.

verticals.label: Grease trap & grease management
verticals.definition: Pumping and maintenance of commercial grease traps and interceptors.

verticals.label: Commercial pressure washing
verticals.definition: Exterior pressure/soft washing for commercial buildings, lots, and fleets.
verticals.notes: Residential exterior washing is in outdoor_grounds_services.

verticals.label: Landscaping (design & install)
verticals.definition: Landscape design, install, and grounds construction for residential and commercial sites.

verticals.label: Lawn care & maintenance
verticals.definition: Recurring mowing, edging, and turf maintenance.

verticals.label: Lawn fertilization & weed control
verticals.definition: Recurring fertilization, weed, and turf-health treatment programs.

verticals.label: Tree care services
verticals.definition: Tree trimming, pruning, removal, and health care by arborists.
verticals.notes: Required vertical. Matches the Tree Care Partners (TCP) PE engagement; 8 managed brands route here.

verticals.label: Stump grinding & removal
verticals.definition: Grinding and removal of tree stumps.

verticals.label: Pest control
verticals.definition: Inspection and treatment for household and commercial pests.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National pest-control brands at the corporate/franchisor level.

verticals.label: Termite control
verticals.definition: Inspection, treatment, and prevention of termite infestation.

verticals.label: Mosquito control
verticals.definition: Seasonal mosquito and outdoor-pest barrier treatment.

verticals.label: Wildlife & animal control
verticals.definition: Humane removal and exclusion of nuisance wildlife from properties.

verticals.label: Irrigation / sprinkler systems
verticals.definition: Install, repair, and maintenance of lawn irrigation and sprinkler systems.

verticals.label: Hardscaping
verticals.definition: Install of patios, retaining walls, pavers, and stone hardscape features.

verticals.label: Sod & turf installation
verticals.definition: Install of sod, artificial turf, and new lawns.

verticals.label: Land clearing & grading
verticals.definition: Clearing, brush removal, and rough grading of lots and acreage.

verticals.label: Pool service & maintenance
verticals.definition: Recurring cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment service for pools.
verticals.notes: Pool construction/build is in residential_home_services (pool_installation).

verticals.label: Snow & ice removal
verticals.definition: Snow plowing and ice management for residential and commercial properties.
verticals.notes: Seasonal/regional; not applicable in some metros.

verticals.label: Holiday & outdoor lighting
verticals.definition: Seasonal holiday light install and permanent outdoor lighting design.

verticals.label: Pressure washing (residential exterior)
verticals.definition: Exterior soft/pressure washing for homes, driveways, and decks.

verticals.label: Junk removal & hauling
verticals.definition: Pickup and disposal of household and commercial junk and debris.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National junk-removal franchisors at the corporate level.

verticals.label: Dumpster / roll-off rental
verticals.definition: Roll-off dumpster and temporary waste-container rental.

verticals.label: Pond & lake management
verticals.definition: Maintenance, aeration, and treatment of private ponds and lakes.

verticals.label: Residential cleaning / maid service
verticals.definition: Recurring and one-time house cleaning for residential customers.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National maid-service franchisors at the corporate level.

verticals.label: Commercial janitorial
verticals.definition: Recurring janitorial and custodial service for commercial facilities.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National janitorial franchisors / national BSC contractors at corporate level.

verticals.label: Carpet & upholstery cleaning
verticals.definition: Deep cleaning of carpets, rugs, and upholstery.

verticals.label: Window cleaning
verticals.definition: Interior and exterior window cleaning for homes and businesses.

verticals.label: Tile & grout cleaning
verticals.definition: Deep cleaning and sealing of tile and grout surfaces.

verticals.label: Air duct cleaning
verticals.definition: Cleaning of HVAC ductwork and ventilation systems.

verticals.label: Dryer vent cleaning
verticals.definition: Cleaning and inspection of residential and commercial dryer vents.

verticals.label: Post-construction cleaning
verticals.definition: Final clean of newly built or renovated spaces.

verticals.label: Move-in / move-out cleaning
verticals.definition: Turnover cleaning for moves and tenant changeovers.

verticals.label: Disaster / water damage restoration
verticals.definition: Emergency water, flood, and storm damage mitigation and restoration.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National restoration franchisors at corporate level.
verticals.notes: Insurance-driven, urgency-sensitive; not health YMYL but watch fabricated-claim language and insurance representations at QA.

verticals.label: Fire & smoke damage restoration
verticals.definition: Cleanup and restoration after fire and smoke damage.

verticals.label: Mold remediation
verticals.definition: Inspection, containment, and removal of indoor mold.
verticals.notes: Flagged YMYL-style: makes indoor-air/health-adjacent claims and is licensed/regulated in many states — route through the compliance brake.

verticals.label: Biohazard / trauma cleanup
verticals.definition: Cleanup and decontamination of biohazard, trauma, and crime scenes.
verticals.notes: Sensitive subject matter; keep marketing language careful and non-graphic.

verticals.label: Floor stripping & waxing
verticals.definition: Strip, wax, and refinish of commercial hard-floor surfaces.

verticals.label: Hoarding cleanup
verticals.definition: Specialized cleanout and remediation of hoarding situations.
verticals.notes: Sensitive; involves vulnerable individuals. Keep messaging compassionate and non-judgmental.

verticals.label: Sanitization & disinfection
verticals.definition: Specialized disinfection and sanitization for homes and facilities.

verticals.label: Residential real estate brokerage
verticals.definition: Local residential buyer/seller agent and brokerage services.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National iBuyer platforms and pure-online discount brokerages.
verticals.notes: Allegiant policy: YMYL — sits atop the largest financial transaction most consumers ever make, and brokerage content routinely discusses appreciation, timing, and market direction (de facto financial claims). Route through compliance brake. Override on the operator confirm only if the partner explicitly disclaims financial advice and sticks to it in their content. Anchor partner: Laurie Flood Team (KW Realty).

verticals.label: Commercial real estate brokerage
verticals.definition: Local commercial leasing, sales, and tenant-rep brokerage.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National CRE platforms (the major national brokerage houses).
verticals.notes: YMYL-adjacent (investment claims). Large-deal/national-account CRE shops may not be single-market.

verticals.label: Property management (residential)
verticals.definition: Leasing, tenant, and maintenance management for residential rentals.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National single-family-rental (SFR) platforms / national REIT operators.
verticals.notes: Financial-adjacent (handles owner funds).

verticals.label: Property management (commercial)
verticals.definition: Operations, leasing, and maintenance management for commercial properties.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National commercial PM platforms.

verticals.label: HOA / community association management
verticals.definition: Management of homeowner and community associations.

verticals.label: Real estate appraisal
verticals.definition: Independent valuation of residential and commercial property.
verticals.notes: Financial valuation; license-regulated. Route through compliance brake.

verticals.label: Home inspection
verticals.definition: Pre-purchase and maintenance inspection of residential property condition.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National inspection franchisors at corporate level.
verticals.notes: Safety/condition findings; license-regulated in many states.

verticals.label: Title & escrow services (local)
verticals.definition: Local title search, title insurance, and escrow/closing services.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National title underwriters at the corporate level.
verticals.notes: Financial + insurance; heavily regulated. Route through compliance brake.

verticals.label: Land surveying
verticals.definition: Boundary, topographic, and ALTA surveying of land parcels.

verticals.label: Vacation / short-term rental management
verticals.definition: Local management of short-term and vacation rental properties.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National STR-management platforms.

verticals.label: Apartment locating / leasing
verticals.definition: Local apartment-finder and leasing-assistance service.
verticals.notes: Common in TX metros; agent is paid by the property.

verticals.label: CPA / accounting firm (local)
verticals.definition: Local certified public accounting and assurance services.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: The Big-Four / national accounting networks.
verticals.notes: Financial YMYL — compliance brake.

verticals.label: Tax preparation
verticals.definition: Individual and small-business tax preparation and filing.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National tax-software platforms / national tax-prep franchisors at corporate level.
verticals.notes: Financial YMYL — compliance brake.

verticals.label: Bookkeeping services
verticals.definition: Recurring bookkeeping and financial record-keeping for small businesses.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National remote-bookkeeping platforms.
verticals.notes: Lower-stakes financial claims, but kept in the YMYL brake group for consistency. Can be delivered remotely — confirm local-market focus before slicing.

verticals.label: Payroll services (local)
verticals.definition: Local payroll processing and compliance for small businesses.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National payroll/HR SaaS platforms.
verticals.notes: Often remote/national; only local when the operator markets to a defined metro.

verticals.label: Insurance agency (local)
verticals.definition: Local agency placing auto, home, life, and commercial insurance.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National direct/online insurers and national carriers (corporate).
verticals.notes: Financial YMYL — compliance brake. Captive-agent and franchise models common.

verticals.label: Mortgage broker / lender (local)
verticals.definition: Local mortgage origination and brokerage services.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National online lenders / national wholesale lenders.
verticals.notes: Financial YMYL — compliance brake. Rate/APR claims are heavily regulated.

verticals.label: Financial advisor / wealth management (local)
verticals.definition: Local financial planning and investment-advisory practice.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National roboadvisors, online brokerages, and national wirehouses.
verticals.notes: Financial YMYL — compliance brake. Note the Austin Moon / Bridgemark RIA M&A engagement is a SELLER-SIDE M&A advisor (national scope, niche) — that operator is NOT a local-slice fit; this vertical is the general local-advisor case.

verticals.label: Notary / mobile notary
verticals.definition: Local notarization and mobile/loan-signing notary services.

verticals.label: Architecture firm (local)
verticals.definition: Local architectural design for residential and commercial projects.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National/global architecture practices.

verticals.label: Engineering firm (local)
verticals.definition: Local civil, structural, and MEP engineering services.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National engineering / AEC firms.

verticals.label: Interior design (local)
verticals.definition: Local residential and commercial interior design services.

verticals.label: IT services / managed IT (local MSP)
verticals.definition: Local managed IT, support, and network services for area businesses.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National MSPs / national cloud and IT-outsourcing providers.
verticals.notes: Borderline — can be delivered remotely. Local-service only when the operator serves on-site clients in a defined metro.

verticals.label: Staffing / employment agency (local)
verticals.definition: Local recruiting and staffing services for area employers.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National staffing networks / national job platforms.

verticals.label: Marketing / advertising agency (local)
verticals.definition: Local marketing, advertising, and creative-services agency.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National/remote digital agencies serving clients across many markets.
verticals.notes: IMPORTANT self-reference: a national-scope agency (clients across multiple metros) is NOT a local-slice fit even if HQ is local. This mirrors Allegiant's own national service model.

verticals.label: Printing / print shop (local)
verticals.definition: Local commercial printing, copy, and finishing services.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National online print-on-demand platforms.

verticals.label: Sign shop (local)
verticals.definition: Local design and fabrication of signage and graphics.

verticals.label: Photography studio (local)
verticals.definition: Local portrait, family, headshot, and commercial photography.
verticals.notes: Event/wedding photography is in events_entertainment.

verticals.label: Translation / interpreting (local)
verticals.definition: Local document translation and on-site interpreting services.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National/remote translation and localization platforms.

verticals.label: Business consulting (local)
verticals.definition: Local management, operations, or small-business consulting.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National/global consultancies and remote-only consultants.
verticals.notes: Borderline — confirm defined-metro focus before slicing.

verticals.label: Court reporting (local)
verticals.definition: Local deposition and court reporting / transcription services.

verticals.label: Process serving (local)
verticals.definition: Local service of legal process and document delivery.

verticals.definition: Local plaintiff-side personal injury and accident representation.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National BigLaw / AmLaw-100 firms and national class-action / mass-tort networks.
verticals.notes: Required edge case example: a local PI firm = local; national mass-tort advertiser = excluded.

verticals.definition: Local divorce, custody, and family-law representation.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National BigLaw / AmLaw-100 firms and national class-action / mass-tort networks.

verticals.definition: Local criminal defense representation.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National BigLaw / AmLaw-100 firms and national class-action / mass-tort networks.

verticals.definition: Local DUI/DWI and traffic-crime defense.

verticals.definition: Local real estate transactional and dispute representation.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National BigLaw / AmLaw-100 firms and national class-action / mass-tort networks.

verticals.label: Bankruptcy law
verticals.definition: Local consumer and small-business bankruptcy representation.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National BigLaw / AmLaw-100 firms and national class-action / mass-tort networks.

verticals.label: Immigration law (local practice)
verticals.definition: Local immigration and naturalization representation.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National high-volume immigration mills / online platforms.

verticals.label: Employment law (plaintiff / local)
verticals.definition: Local employee-side employment and labor representation.

verticals.label: Workers' compensation law
verticals.definition: Local workers' compensation claimant representation.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National BigLaw / AmLaw-100 firms and national class-action / mass-tort networks.

verticals.definition: Local small-business, contract, and commercial-law representation.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National BigLaw / AmLaw-100 firms and national class-action / mass-tort networks.

verticals.definition: Local general civil litigation and dispute representation.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National BigLaw / AmLaw-100 firms and national class-action / mass-tort networks.

verticals.definition: Local landlord/tenant and eviction representation.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National BigLaw / AmLaw-100 firms and national class-action / mass-tort networks.

verticals.label: Traffic ticket defense
verticals.definition: Local traffic citation and license-defense representation.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National BigLaw / AmLaw-100 firms and national class-action / mass-tort networks.

verticals.label: General practice law firm (local)
verticals.definition: Local multi-practice general law firm.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National BigLaw / AmLaw-100 firms and national class-action / mass-tort networks.

verticals.definition: Local general and family dentistry.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National dental-support-organization (DSO) platforms at corporate level.

verticals.definition: Local occupational rehabilitation and daily-function therapy.

verticals.definition: Local speech-language pathology and therapy.

verticals.definition: Local optometric exams and vision care.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National online eyewear/contact retailers (for the retail side).

verticals.definition: Local medical and surgical eye care.

verticals.definition: Local hearing evaluation and hearing-aid services.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National online/OTC hearing-aid brands.

verticals.label: Podiatry
verticals.definition: Local foot and ankle medical care.

verticals.definition: Local walk-in urgent and episodic medical care.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National urgent-care franchisors at corporate level.

verticals.label: Mental health / counseling practice
verticals.definition: Local therapy, counseling, and behavioral-health practice.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National teletherapy platforms.
verticals.notes: YMYL + sensitive. Crisis/outcome claims and testimonials are restricted on ad platforms.

verticals.label: Psychiatry
verticals.definition: Local psychiatric evaluation and medication management.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National telepsychiatry platforms.

verticals.label: Acupuncture
verticals.definition: Local acupuncture and traditional-medicine practice.
verticals.notes: Makes health claims; flag for the compliance brake.

verticals.label: Massage therapy (therapeutic)
verticals.definition: Local therapeutic and medical massage services.
verticals.notes: Borderline: relaxation spas belong in fitness_beauty_personal_care; therapeutic/medical-claim practices lean YMYL — confirm before slicing.

verticals.definition: Local interventional and medical pain-management practice.

verticals.label: Orthopedics
verticals.definition: Local orthopedic and musculoskeletal medical practice.

verticals.label: ENT (otolaryngology)
verticals.definition: Local ear, nose, and throat medical practice.

verticals.definition: Local cardiology and heart-care practice.

verticals.definition: Local digestive-health medical practice.

verticals.definition: Local urology medical practice.

verticals.definition: Local swimming instruction and lessons.

verticals.label: Language school (local)
verticals.definition: Local in-person language instruction.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National/online language-learning platforms.

verticals.label: Cooking classes (local)
verticals.definition: Local culinary and cooking-class instruction.

verticals.label: Daycare / preschool
verticals.definition: Local childcare, daycare, and preschool.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National childcare-center operators at corporate level.
verticals.notes: Child-safety sensitive (YMYL-style). Route through the compliance brake; testimonials and safety claims need review.

verticals.label: After-school / enrichment program
verticals.definition: Local after-school care and enrichment.

verticals.label: STEM / coding / robotics program (local)
verticals.definition: Local in-person STEM, coding, and robotics instruction for kids.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National online kids-coding platforms.

verticals.label: Funeral home
verticals.definition: Local funeral, memorial, and burial services.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National death-care conglomerates at corporate level.
verticals.notes: Sensitive ('your life') and consumer-protection regulated (FTC Funeral Rule). Route through the compliance brake; keep messaging respectful.

verticals.label: Crematory / cremation services
verticals.definition: Local cremation provider.
verticals.notes: See funeral_home re: sensitivity and compliance brake.

verticals.label: Cemetery / monument / headstone
verticals.definition: Local cemetery, monument, and headstone services.
verticals.notes: Sensitive subject; respectful messaging.

verticals.label: Moving company (local)
verticals.definition: Local residential and commercial moving services.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National van-line / long-distance moving brands at corporate level.
verticals.notes: Local moves are local-service; interstate/long-distance moving is the national variant.

verticals.label: Self-storage facility
verticals.definition: Local self-storage and portable-storage rental.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National self-storage REIT operators at corporate level.

verticals.label: Packing / move-management services
verticals.definition: Local packing, unpacking, and senior-move-management services.

verticals.label: Dry cleaning / laundry service
verticals.definition: Local dry cleaning and laundry services.

verticals.label: Laundromat
verticals.definition: Local self-service and full-service laundromat.

verticals.label: Tailor / alterations
verticals.definition: Local clothing alterations and tailoring.

verticals.label: Shoe / leather repair
verticals.definition: Local shoe repair and leather services.

verticals.label: Picture framing
verticals.definition: Local custom picture-framing services.

verticals.label: Mobile locksmith (personal/auto)
verticals.definition: Local mobile locksmith for residential, auto, and emergency lockouts.
verticals.national_variant_excluded: National locksmith dispatch/lead-routing call-centers.
verticals.notes: Overlaps residential_locksmith / commercial_locksmith; this entry covers mobile/auto/emergency operators.

verticals.label: Personal concierge / errand service (local)
verticals.definition: Local concierge, errand, and personal-assistant services.

inclusion_criteria: A vertical qualifies as local-service (and may fire the Vertical-Slice gate) when ALL THREE hold: (1) it primarily serves customers within a defined geographic market — a single city, metro, or contiguous region, not multi-state or national; (2) the transaction typically requires the customer visiting a physical location OR the business going to the customer for in-person service; and (3) it competes locally — its primary competitors are other businesses in the same metro, not national chains or pure-digital players. Every vertical in this enum is local-service by construction. Note: this enum determines the LOCAL-SERVICE half of the gate only. The 'revenue concentrated in <=5 money pages' half is established by the operator confirms + A.R.C. signals at routing time, not by membership in this list. B2B verticals can be local-service (e.g., commercial_kitchen_equipment_repair). Franchises are local-service at the FRANCHISEE level; the franchisor entity is not.
exclusion_criteria: NOT local-service even if headquartered locally: pure e-commerce / DTC brands; national B2B services; remote-only or SaaS-delivered digital services; multi-state or national operators whose competitive set is national rather than metro-level; and franchisor (corporate) entities. Where a vertical has a clear national variant, it is captured in that vertical's 'national_variant_excluded' field (e.g., a local boutique law firm is local-service; an AmLaw-100 / national mass-tort firm is excluded; a local agency is local-service, a national/remote agency serving many metros is excluded). Borderline verticals that can be delivered remotely (bookkeeping, payroll, IT/MSP, business consulting, online tutoring) are local-service ONLY when the operator markets to and serves a defined metro in person; confirm before slicing. Retail (brick-and-mortar) is the softest fit on criterion (3) because national e-commerce competes directly with it — slice only when the operator's draw is genuinely local.
